ownership_contract.task_goal: PR Ready implementation for Harbor FR #158 real runtime session lifecycle covering #165/#166/#167/#168.
ownership_contract.read_scope: Harbor repository, GitHub issue metadata, and read-only Donut Browser source locators outside Harbor.
ownership_contract.write_ownership: Harbor runtime-api files and HARBOR-165 Loom carriers only.
ownership_contract.output_format: Implementation PR with metadata covering #165 #166 #167 #168 and final subagent report to the main controller.

ownership_constraints: Write ownership is limited to Harbor runtime-api files and HARBOR-165 Loom carriers.
Forbidden writes include App, Lode, WebEnvoy/Core, research, and sources paths.
No live account, browser profile, credential, cookie/token, CAPTCHA/2FA bypass, merge, or issue closeout actions.
integration_evidence: Runtime session lifecycle split out of index.ts into focused modules below 500 lines.
Identity environment sessions can open, reuse, lock, release, and stop with structured URL/title/status/control/error facts.
Local dedicated provider constructs a real browser launch command, reads CDP page facts, opens URLs, and stops the child process.
Provider scope remains CloakBrowser primary/default and official Chrome restricted fallback; Donut Browser remains mechanism reference only.

suite_path_consumption.not_applicable_rationale: Bounded Runtime API lifecycle slice with no persistent storage migration, no live account/profile material, no hosted browser, no cross-repo API publication, and no external visible site action.
suite_path_consumption.consumer_boundary: App/Core/Lode receive public refs, URL/title/status, lifecycle, control owner/lock, and structured runtime errors only.
suite_path_consumption.recheck_condition: Upgrade to full suite when adding persistent session store, long-lived profile directories, real credential/keychain integration, remote/hosted runtime, live account login, cross-repo schema publication, or external visible site actions.
